test_cases.title: structured-output tool returns parsed JSON object
test_cases.description: Agent with schema { type: object, properties: { answer: string } } calls structured-output tool, agent-pool extracts parsedOutput from tool_execution_start
steps: Spawn pi subprocess with STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SCHEMA env var
LLM calls structured-output({ answer: 'hello' })
agent-pool processJsonlEvent captures tool_execution_start
parsedOutput equals { answer: 'hello' } (JS object, not string)

test_cases.title: Enforcement hook triggers sendUserMessage on missing tool call
test_cases.description: LLM ends turn without calling structured-output → turn_end handler sends reminder
steps: Spawn pi subprocess with STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SCHEMA env var
LLM responds with text only (no tool call)
turn_end handler detects no structured-output call
sendUserMessage injects reminder
LLM calls structured-output in next turn

test_cases.title: Ajv validation failure returns tool error to LLM
test_cases.description: LLM calls structured-output with invalid data → tool throws → LLM corrects
steps: Schema requires { count: number }
LLM calls structured-output({ count: 'not-a-number' })
Tool throws Error with Ajv error details
LLM receives tool error, calls again with correct type

test_cases.title: tool_call hook blocks non-workflow usage
test_cases.description: LLM tries to call structured-output without STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SCHEMA env var
steps: Start Pi without STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SCHEMA
LLM attempts to call structured-output tool
tool_call hook returns { block: true, reason: '...' }
Tool call is blocked with explanation

test_cases.title: No env var → no tool registered
test_cases.description: Without STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SCHEMA, extension is completely silent
steps: Start Pi session without STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SCHEMA
Verify structured-output tool is not in tool list
Verify no system prompt modification
Agent works normally

test_cases.title: Invalid schema → silent skip with stderr log
test_cases.description: STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SCHEMA contains invalid JSON or invalid JSON Schema
steps: Set STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SCHEMA to '{invalid json'
Extension logs error to stderr
No tool registered, no crash
Agent runs normally

test_cases.title: agent-pool extracts parsedOutput from tool_execution_start
steps: processJsonlEvent receives { type: 'tool_execution_start', toolName: 'structured-output', args: { key: 'value' } }
pipeline.parsedOutput is set to { key: 'value' }

test_cases.title: Schema present + no tool call → agent-level failure
test_cases.description: FR-4 second layer: parsedOutput undefined with schema → return failure result
steps: spawnAndParse with opts.schema set
Subprocess exits without tool_execution_start for structured-output
Result has success: false with error message

test_cases.title: No schema → no STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SCHEMA env var
test_cases.description: Non-schema agent calls work exactly as before
steps: enqueue({ prompt: 'hello' }) without schema
spawnAndParse does NOT set STRUCTURED_OUTPUT_SCHEMA env var
Result uses content (text output), parsedOutput undefined
